headline: Light duty disputes Preparation Checklist — Utah County
articleBody:
Light duty disputes Preparation Checklist for Utah County Clients

Before your Light duty disputes appointment with Just Work Comp Law, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Incident report
2. Medical records
3. Witness statements
4. Employer notification
5. Doctor notes

Contact Just Work Comp Law at 801-746-0290 to get started.
